# 🚨 Jekyll Pre‑Merge Verification
- [ ] Title correct
- [ ] Tags assigned
- [ ] Categories assigned
- [ ] Date correct (no accidental future dates)
- [ ] Front matter is valid YAML
- [ ] Liquid used only where required
